text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hey, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hello. Are you two heading out somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Well, actually...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Are you free right now? Would you care to join us
for some tea?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: We were just on our way back from the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They wanted to check how our injuries are healing
up.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see. And what did they say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm healing. However... it appears the day I can
return to the track is still rather distant.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I asked when I'll be able to race again, but the
doctor couldn't give me a straight answer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There is no use in dwelling upon it. For now, we
need to focus on recovering until we are fit to run
again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ... It's not like anyone's waiting for me, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
How can you say something like that?! Of course
they are!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But how many people are really going to
remember my name when I'm not racing?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The longer I'm off the track, the more distant a
memory I become.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What about me?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm here!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The three of us fought for the Classic Triple
Crown! If I continue racing...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Each time I run, everyone will remember you two
as well!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll save your places on the turf! As long as I run,
no one will forget about either of you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, aren't you dependable?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The two of us will do our part and focus on
getting better. Isn't that right, Chiyono O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Sorry for getting all mopey back there...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my best to heal up, so wait a little
longer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will! For as long as it takes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Arima Kinen. Yaeno Muteki decided
not to race, but asked if we could come watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands of Nakayama Racecourse are packed
with fans who have come to witness the
showdown between Tamamo Cross and Oguri
Cap.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Tamamo Cross! Show us what White
Lightning can do!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Go get 'em, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
You're da strongest, Tamamo! Don't give 'em an
inch!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Go, Oguri Cap! Show everyone what you're made
of!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Is it Oguri Cap?! She did it! Oguri Cap has won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your victory! Can you tell us
how you're feeling right now?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Right now... I'm happy I beat Tama.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: What was it like facing off against her?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Losing to her at the autumn Tenno Sho was
rough, so I really wanted to win today.

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
You beat Tamamo Cross! You're the strongest,
Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You're the leader of your whole generation,
Oguri! We're counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
With her victory today, some are saying that
Oguri Cap has earned her spot at the peak of
Japan's racing scene!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
She's cemented her place as the star of the
current classic-year generation!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The star of the classic year...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (There's no questioning Oguri's prowess.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(But I'm the one who battled for the Classic Triple
Crown...)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's popularity rivals Tamamo Cross's.
Next year's Twinkle Series is shaping up to be one
to remember!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Can't say I'm surprised! Even Tamamo sees her as
a rival!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
If we're just talking about this year's classic
racers, I've got my eye on Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
No way! Oguri's on a whole 'nother level! I can't
wait to see how many G1s she wins!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Why aren't they talking about me...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Why isn't anyone talking about our fierce battle
at the Japanese Derby?!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I won't let you beat me! The Derby is mine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No way! I won't give up! I'm winning this for
Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Ardan & Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaahhh!
Raaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I don't care if my legs shatter! I will burn out my
very lifeforce! And that light will serve as proof
that I was alive!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, no, nooo! The Derby's mine! It's
miiiiine!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Chiyono O ran like her life depended on it!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Ardan put everything on the line!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (And I tore up the track right beside them!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(It's burned into my heart, setting it atremble to
this very day!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ... It's not like anyone's waiting for me, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But how many people are really going to
remember my name when I'm not racing?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The longer I'm off the track, the more distant a
memory I become.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Why should Chiyono O and Ardan have to fear
that they won't have a place to return to?!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I ran with them, and I'm still here!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm the true leader of the classic-year racers!

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek! Oguri! Look over here!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap! Good luck next year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooo! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: So that's how it's going to be! In that case...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki throws back her head and lets out
a roar filled with such rage it feels like it might rip
apart the very sky. A few close spectators give
her a look...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that angry cry is swallowed up in the
thunderous roar of joyous cheers for the other
two Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: For the time being, I pull her to the entrance.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Listen to me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My next goal is to defeat Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Everyone is saying that she's the strongest!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So it stands to reason that defeating her will
serve as proof of my skill!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No one will be able to ignore the person who
brings down Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Everyone will have to remember that Chiyono O, Ardan and I are the ones who raced in the Classic Triple Crown! We are the who will carry this generation forward!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki says all of this in one rushed
breath, rage steaming off of her as if she was truly
burning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's beginning to lose herself in her fury.
However, the feeling driving that rage is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An insane and forceful drive to defeat Oguri Cap.
In other words—an obsession.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer?! I'd like to hear what you're
thinking!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I doubt that Yaeno Muteki wants a drawn-out
discussion right now, so I skip straight to the
point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's finally found a goal she wants so badly that
she's discovered obsession, so I gladly encourage
her.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's exactly what I want to hear!
